title: Spanakopita
excerpt: Ingredients 1 packet filo pastry 500 g baby spinach 4 spring onions 1 red onion 3 cloves garlic pinch of nutmeg 100 g good feta cheese 100 g ricotta cheese 2 eggs, beaten black pepper 60 ml fresh chopped dill 125 ml melted butter Method Blanch the spinach in …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 packet filo pastry
  • 500 g baby spinach
  • 4 spring onions
  • 1 red onion
  • 3 cloves garlic
  • pinch of nutmeg
  • 100 g good feta cheese
  • 100 g ricotta cheese
  • 2 eggs, beaten
  • black pepper
  • 60 ml fresh chopped dill
  • 125 ml melted butter

Method

Blanch the spinach in hot water and squeeze out all the water.

In the pan fry the red onion, spring onions and garlic.

Add to the spinach.

Add the rest of the ingredients except the melted butter.

Heat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.

Cut the pastry into 4 strips.

Place one sheet of filo pastry on a board. Brush with butter. Place another sheet on top.

Brush with butter again.

Put a teaspoon of the spinach mixture at the bottom of the filo strip. Fold over and shape into triangles.

Brush with butter again.

Oil a baking tray and pack the triangles onto the tray. Bake for 30 minutes.

Easy!
